metadata.title: Revise account lookup endpoint
metadata.description: Second review of the account lookup endpoint after author changes.

finding.title: Account lookup misses authorization
finding.body: The lookup uses a request-supplied accountId without proving the caller can access that account.
evidence: Prior review saw db.accounts.findById(accountId) returned directly.
finding.recommendation: Check account ownership or required permission before returning account data.

finding.title: Missing accountId validation
finding.body: The prior version did not validate a missing accountId before querying.
evidence: Prior review saw accountId read without a presence check.
finding.recommendation: Return a validation error when accountId is missing.

fakeFindings.title: Account lookup misses authorization
fakeFindings.body: The revised lookup still uses a request-supplied accountId without proving the caller can access that account.
evidence: The patch still returns db.accounts.findById(accountId) without an ownership check.
fakeFindings.recommendation: Check account ownership or required permission before returning account data.
